text: I keep hoping things will get better, but I am bracing myself for it to all fall apart again.

expected.notes: Mixed hope/fear; ambivalent field, fear+hope tension expected.

text: I am absolutely furious that they cancelled the project without telling anyone.

expected.notes: High-arousal negative, approach -> anger/krodha at excess.

text: Ever since she left, a heavy sadness has stayed with me every single day.
After a long struggle, I finally feel calm and at peace with how things are.
I was terrified when the call came. Then I went numb. But slowly I am starting to feel hopeful again.

expected.notes: Multi-episode trajectory: fear -> numbness -> hope (recovery/turning point).

text: The meeting is scheduled for 3pm in conference room B on the second floor.
